title: Orange Finance - Rekt
relevance_summary: Private key leak followed by contract upgrades and token sweeps on Arbitrum-based protocol

prevention.rule: Block any tx that upgrades contracts and performs large token transfers in the same transaction.

red_flags: Contract upgrade followed by large token transfers
Multiple token transfers in quick succession
monitoring_rules: Block any tx that upgrades contracts and performs large token transfers in the same transaction.
summary: Orange Finance suffered a private key leak, allowing an attacker to upgrade contracts and drain funds across multiple decentralized exchanges. A guard could have detected and blocked the attack by monitoring for contract upgrades followed by large token transfers.
